Given the user is on the Login screen
When the user enters valid credentials and taps the Login button
Then the user should be navigated to the Home screen

Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user taps the Notifications icon
Then the user should be navigated to the Notifications screen and see a list of recent notifications

Given the user is on the Profile screen
When the user updates their profile picture and saves the changes
Then the new profile picture should be displayed on the Profile screen

Given the user is on the Settings screen
When the user toggles the Dark Mode switch
Then the app's theme should change to dark mode immediately

Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user pulls down to refresh the content
Then the latest content should be loaded and displayed on the screen
